steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The underlined portion opens with “thus” and pivots to evaluate Oliveira's approach: “capitalizing on the research potential offered by a vast but hitherto relatively underutilized source.” The focus is on the approach itself, not what it discovered or how to apply it.

steps.title: Match the function to the answer
steps.content:
The passage offers evaluative commentary on the significance of the approach—using historical DNA from museum specimens for research.

The other choices miss this function:
  • A specifies applications not discussed
  • C emphasizes findings when the passage only mentions potential
  • D claims the passage explains why the method went underutilized rather than merely noting the fact
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
